metodos.codigoOriginal: Report Form SigReCmm To Printer Prompt NoConsole

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject([fSqlConector], .Name)

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
		=DoDefault()
	Else
		=Messagebox([Impossivel Efetuar Conex„o com Servidor de Banco de Dados...], 0+48, [CreateObject])
		Return .f.
	EndIf
EndWith
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Private pDtI, pDtF

Zap In crAnalitico
Zap In crImpressao
Zap In crCabecalho

lcPrc = Padr(ThisForm.getCods.Value, 40)
lcFvd = Padr(ThisForm.getCodVens.Value, 10)

Set Step On 

* Select Com CabeÁalho da Tabela de Comiss„o Selecionada
lcQuery = [Select a.* ] + ;
			[From SigCmCab a ] + ;
		   [Where a.Cods = '] + lcPrc + [']

If (ThisForm.poDataMgr.SqlExecute(lcQuery, [LocalCmCab]) < 1)
	=MessageBox([Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!], 16, [Falha na Conex„o (LocalCmCab)])
	Return .f.
EndIf
Go To... [TRUNCADO]

Local loLista, llOk

If Not Empty(This.Value)

	*** mena - 26/10/2016 - mostra somente os mapas permitidos conforme a empresa do usu·rio ***
	lcQuery = [select * from sigcmCab]
	If (ThisForm.poDataMgr.SqlExecute(lcQuery, [LocalMap]) < 1)
		=MessageBox([Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!], 16, [Falha na Conex„o (LocalMap)])
		Return .f.
	ENDIF
	
	SELECT LocalMap
	SCAN
		llOk=fAcessoEmpresa(Usuar,'C',LocalMap.emps,'','',ThisForm.PodataMgr,.t.)
		IF !llOk
			DELETE 
		ENDIF
	ENDSCAN
